texto: I am that woman...A woman with compassion and empathyAn alluring woman whose beauty emanates from the insideA woman of courage and perseveranceA woman gifted with many talentsA woman who has so much to give and know where she is goingA woman who is everything but lost without you.
explicacao: Citação de Julie Cox sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “I am that woman...A woman with compassion and empathyAn alluring woman whose beauty emanates from…” articula amor, love, passion em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como passion e romance.
